title: Substrate v2 Conditional Doc-Check
description: Declarative file-glob → required-doc-or-prompt registry entry (plan §3.4). Walked by audit and review workflows via `substrate query doc-checks --for-files <files>`. Findings surface in --json output.

id.description: Unique doc-check id within the workspace.

when.description: Conditions; ALL must match for the doc-check to fire.

files-changed-any.description: Doc-check fires when any changed file matches one of these globs.

files-changed-all.description: Doc-check fires when all listed globs are matched among the changed files.

commit-message-pattern.description: Doc-check fires when the commit message matches this regex.

branch-pattern.description: Doc-check fires when the current branch matches this regex.

require.description: Optional concrete docs the user is expected to have touched / created. The doc-check fires (and lists these as missing) when none of `one-of` was touched, or any `all-of` is missing.

one-of.description: At least one of these paths must appear in changed-files for the check to be satisfied.

all-of.description: All of these paths must appear in changed-files for the check to be satisfied.

prompt.description: Human-readable prompt to surface when the check fires. Should explain WHY the doc update matters.

severity.description: Severity assigned to the finding when the check fires.
